===== Case 1: default mixed pose =====
Unitree SDK inverseDynamics comparison
SDK hasGripper = True
Python model = current z1_analytic_dynamics.py merged link6/gripper model
q = [ 0.2   0.25 -0.25  0.15  0.1   0.1 ]
dq = [ 0.5 -0.3  0.2 -0.1  0.4 -0.2]
ddq = [ 0.1  -0.2   0.3  -0.1   0.05 -0.02]

  3.081403192e-05 -7.738153267e-05]

  0.000123359]

  0.000123359]

  0.000115511]

Unitree SDK inverseDynamics comparison
SDK hasGripper = True
Python model = current z1_analytic_dynamics.py merged link6/gripper model
q = [ 0.      1.5708 -1.5708 -0.074   0.      0.    ]

===== Case 3: forward 100pct pose =====
Unitree SDK inverseDynamics comparison
SDK hasGripper = True
Python model = current z1_analytic_dynamics.py merged link6/gripper model
q = [ 0.    1.5  -1.   -0.54  0.    0.  ]
dq = [ 0.1  -0.2   0.1  -0.05  0.    0.  ]
ddq = [ 0.05 -0.1   0.05 -0.02  0.    0.  ]
